item.title: Bruce Willis’ daughter Rumer Willis hits back at critics with video of her breastfeeding 3yo daughter
item.description: Rumer Willis, the daughter of Bruce Willis and Demi Moore, has hit back at critics on Instagram after posting a video of herself breastfeeding her three-year-old daughter.

item.title: Russian attack kills three in Odesa, including toddler
item.description: The child was one of three people killed in Odesa, while Ukraine targeted a key Russian oil port.

item.title: NASA’s Artemis II astronauts break 56-year-old record for distance from Earth
item.description: The crew will be plunged into darkness and communications blackouts as they fly around the moon.

item.title: ‘Painless’ needle-free flu vaccine for kids released for free under New South Wales Nasal Spray Influenza Vaccination Program
item.description: The painless option is offered amid a spike in hospital admissions and waning faith in the vaccine.

item.title: Army reservist charged after allegedly working as a drone operator for Ukraine during war with Russia
item.description: The 25-year-old faces a maximum penalty of 20 years in prison.

item.title: TV star Grant Denyer shares health update after Bathurst 6 Hour crash
item.description: The charismatic presenter and game-show host was involved in a three-car collision.

item.title: ATO rolls out in-app call verification to help Australians spot scams as tax time fraud surges
item.description: Scams peak during tax season with almost 7500 impersonation frauds reported in last July alone.

item.title: Olympic cyclist Rohan Dennis speaks out after ‘tone-deaf’ social media post causes backlash following death of wife Melissa Hoskins
item.description: ‘I loved Melissa and the last thing I ever wanted was to hurt her.’

item.title: Hawthorn coach Sam Mitchell makes shock manager switch to Craig Hutchison’s Bravo Management
item.description: The surprise move follows Zach Merrett’s split with Tom Petroro earlier this year.

item.title: Aussie cricket great David Warner charged with drink driving
item.description: The 39-year-old allegedly stopped before the testing site, and then blew over double the legal limit.

item.title: Police investigating suspected vandalism at Essendon headquarters
item.description: Officials returned to the club to find grass had been burnt with an estimated five-figure sum of damage.

item.title: AFL ‘not happy’ as fresh vision uncovers umpire error in final quarter of Fremantle’s win over Adelaide
item.description: It’s the latest in a growing list of mistakes that have gone against Adelaide in close games.

item.title: ASIC eliminates 12,000 dodgy scam sites, issues warning over evolving online threat
item.description: Authorities are killing an average of 32 dodgy websites a day but the fight is far from over.

item.title: Socceroos World Cup hero Mitch Duke announces retirement: ‘It’s time’
item.description: ‘I don’t want to die wondering. This is my last chance.’

item.title: How to stash up to $200k into your nest egg by downsizing, without leaving your suburb
item.description: New research shows where downsizers can gain the most.

item.title: Melbourne families drowning in rubbish as council workers strike for pay rise
item.description: Thousands of families are struggling with rotting waste as a bitter council fight takes a nasty turn.

item.title: Stunning first-ever photographs of the dark side of the moon sent back to Earth by NASA’s Artemis II astronauts on lunar mission
item.description: It is the first time humans have seen the far side of the moon with their own eyes — here is what they captured.

item.title: Brisbane rideshare driver charged over alleged stalking, sexual assault and coercive control involving multiple women
item.description: Police say he contacted the women through social media after their trips before his behaviour allegedly escalated into threats and assault.

item.title: Winx’s $10m foal Quinceanera retired without ever racing: ‘Disappointing’
item.description: The news comes two years after the filly made worldwide headlines.

item.title: Jackie O allegedly complained multiple times about co-host Kyle Sandilands before on-air fight
item.description: Henderson and her former co-host Kyle Sandilands are each suing their radio bosses over the end of their multi-million-dollar contracts.

item.title: Former NRL star Curtis Scott cleared to fight in bare-knuckle boxing match after assault charges
item.description: The 28-year-old’s solicitor asked the court to vary the bail conditions and remove a night-time curfew.

item.title: ‘What are you afraid of?’: 7NEWS Spotlight journalist Liam Bartlett clashes with Energy Minister Chris Bowen
item.description: ‘You’re totally hypocritical.’

item.title: Perth drivers left emotional after stranger pays for their fuel in random act of kindness
item.description: ‘I was just overwhelmed by the gesture.’

item.title: High-priced Medik8 sunscreens recalled in Australia over concerns SPF is lower than labelled
item.description: Consumers who bought the affected sunscreens are urged to stop using them.

item.title: Full picture of deadly bird flu on sub-Antarctic Heard Island yet to be revealed
item.description: The devastating strain reached Antarctica from South America in 2023 and has caused mass sea bird deaths and killed seals.

item.title: Tennis star Daniil Medvedev throws wild racquet-smashing tantrum before suffering first 6-0 6-0 loss
item.description: ‘The crowd started cheering to the beat of his racquet smashes.’

item.title: Nick Faldo responds to fresh Greg Norman attack as old rivalry explodes
item.description: One of the game’s most bitter rivalries has exploded again ... and it’s not over yet.

item.title: ‘Ketamine Queen’ sentenced to 15 years in jail for LA overdose death of Friends actor Matthew Perry
item.description: The ‘Ketamine Queen’ has learned her fate for her part in the actor’s fatal overdose.

item.title: Former architect admits killing eight women in Gilgo Beach, New York serial slayings
item.description: The now 62-year-old’s daughter was facing him when he admitted to the grisly murders.

item.title: Middle East war: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese announces major fuel deal to boost supply for regional Australia
item.description: ‘This is not business as usual ... this is additional supply here in Australia that they will be able to source.’

item.title: New footage reveals final stage of Jennifer Hawkins and Jake Wall's $45m clifftop compound
item.description: The five-year Rocca Bella project is almost complete.

item.title: Facebook Marketplace users warned over increase in Australia Post scam
item.description: Australians lost more than $2 billion to scams in 2025.

item.title: Top ADF officer Admiral David Johnston warns US war effort leaves Australia exposed in Indo Pacific region
item.description: China’s recent military deployments in our region prompted the alert.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: Australia, Singapore strike deal to secure fuel and LNG supplies
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Michael J. Fox responds to report of his death: ‘WTF?’
item.description: The Back to the Future star has been living with Parkinson’s Disease for decades.

item.title: Melania Trump addresses rumours of relationship with Jeffrey Epstein at extraordinary White House event
item.description: The US first lady has pushed the scandal back into the spotlight.

item.title: Australian veteran David Warner suffers golden duck and record defeat on cricket return
item.description: The Aussie veteran has hopped straight off the plane and walked into a nightmare.

item.title: Former prime minister Tony Abbott calls for Australia to join US in its war against Iran
item.description: ‘With the greatest of respect, I just don’t think this is a particularly serious contribution.’

item.title: Hip-hop legend Afrika Bambaataa dead at 67
item.description: ‘With his passing, we reflect on his contributions to the genre and broader culture.’

item.title: Golf legend Gary Player divides internet with inappropriate comment to journalist
item.description: ‘The mind isn’t quite what it was.’

item.title: The Housemaid’s author Freida McFadden reveals secret identity after living double life
item.description: The best-selling novelist has long appeared in public in a wig and glasses while writing under a pseudonym.

item.title: Actress Melissa McCarthy unveils dramatic transformation following weight-loss injection drama
item.description: The Bridesmaids star has previously spoken about body image and how her attitude has shifted.

item.title: Supercars on high alert with cyclone threatening to derail final race on North Island
item.description: A statement has been issued and officials are working closely with emergency services.

item.title: Missing crime scenes and fading memories: Ben Roberts-Smith case highlights the complexity of proving war crimes
item.description: Building a criminal case years after events unfold in a war zone is extraordinarily complex.

item.title: Australian Idol 2026 top three prepare for their last performance: ‘Out of your control’
item.description: The country voted to put Harlan, Kalani and Kesha through to the competition’s grand final.

item.title: Australian man, 30, dies in Bali after being found on hotel balcony in Seminyak
item.description: His girlfriend made the shocking discovery at 4.15am.

item.title: Fans left ‘heartbroken’ as McDonald’s quietly discontinues beloved menu item
item.description: McDonald’s has quietly discontinued a popular menu item, leaving fans of the dessert shocked and ‘heartbroken’.

item.title: My Reno Rules: Meet the Aussie families ready to put their renovation skills to the test
item.description: Four teams will transform two rundown homes under the watchful eye of billionaire businessman Adrian Portelli.

item.title: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor scandal: Disgraced former prince under fire for ‘giving it large’ post eviction
item.description: Disgraced former prince Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor has been criticised for still ‘giving it large’ after his eviction from the Royal Lodge.

item.title: I’d never made a wedding cake in my life, then I agreed to make my best friend’s. These are the hacks that saved me
item.description: It took weeks of testing to uncover baking’s top secrets — and now the public needs to know.

item.title: Australians delay prescriptions, skip doses and use expired medicine as cost-of-living pressures bites
item.description: Some are choosing between food and treatment, with many unable to afford non-subsidised medicines, a study found.

item.title: Peter Dutton lands LNP-appointed position on board of the Queensland Investment Corporation
item.description: The LNP-appointed position could see a salary of up to $135,000 a year.

item.title: Middle East war: Shut Strait of Hormuz and Lebanon fighting strains US-Iran truce
item.description: As peace talks are set to begin, the ceasefire remains fragile.

item.title: Mum shares how her own family’s breakdown inspired a support group for estranged parents
item.description: ‘I never thought it would happen to me.’

item.title: Middle East war live updates: US-Iran peace talks begin in Pakistan amid uneasy two-week ceasefire
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: NDIS overhaul uncertainty ‘deeply unsettling’ for people with disability as government weighs major reforms ahead of federal budget
item.description: Advocates say uncertainty is weighing heavily on the disability community, warning cost-cutting must not come at the expense of essential support.

item.title: Astronauts on Artemis II mission splash down in Pacific Ocean after record-breaking trip around moon
item.description: Applause erupted in NASA’s mission control as astronauts emerged from the spacecraft.

item.title: Supercars cancel final race due to intense cyclone in New Zealand
item.description: ‘A cyclone of this intensity leaves no other option.’

item.title: Man extradited from Perth to Sydney over alleged shopping centre scam targeting elderly women
item.description: Alleged crime syndicates have committed similar offences across two states.

item.title: Rank outsider Changingoftheguard stuns field to win Sydney Cup at $61
item.description: The longshot held off challengers to win the marathon staying test.

item.title: Local hero Ryan Wood claims Toyota’s first Supercars win as cyclone forces big change in New Zealand
item.description: The 22-year-old held off a host of established stars to clinch victory.

item.title: Sir Delius ends Autumn Glow’s unbeaten streak in massive boilover at Randwick
item.description: The superstar was odds-on to make it 12 from 12, but fell short in the Queen Elizabeth Stakes.

item.title: 7NEWS The Issue Podcast: Independent Senator David Pocock responds to Anthony Albanese’s claim his gas tax push is ‘promoting grievance’
item.description: ‘There’s a certain type of politician that when they feel uncomfortable ... they just get personal.’

item.title: Fake ‘miracle’ weight loss drug Retatrutide flooding online market as experts warn of dangers
item.description: Experts are warning of the serious dangers the counterfeit versions possess.

item.title: Woman charged over attempted murder of young girl, 10, in Yarrabilba, Queensland
item.description: Police allege the woman gave herself and the child poison which caused them both to become sick.

item.title: Australian Government launches ‘every little bit helps’ campaign for fuel crisis guidance
item.description: Ads will play across television and digital platforms on how you can play your part.

item.title: Distressing scenes as star Dog Ed Richards limps off in ‘real trouble’ during loss to Hawthorn
item.description: ‘No one wants to see that. He’s writhing in pain.’

item.title: Birthday turns to tragedy as dad and two kids lose everything in Gold Coast house fire believed caused by e-bike battery
item.description: ‘If anyone was in there they weren’t going to be able to get out.’

item.title: 2026 Audi A5 TFSI 150kW review
item.description: The entry-level A5 is practical and comfortable, but ultimately fairly unexciting – and its cabin has lost the elegance Audi was known for.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: Peace talks between the US and Iran continue in Pakistan as Donald Trump downplays negotiations
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news of the tenuous ceasefire holding back conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel.

item.title: New Mitsubishi Australia leadership won't accelerate EV plans to meet emissions regulations
item.description: Despite a change at the top, Mitsubishi Australia says it will continue to offer a mix of powertrains – not just EVs – amid tightening emissions laws.

item.title: Long weekend family road trips presented by Mahindra: Victorian High Country
item.description: SPONSORED: We head to the hills for the latest in our series of extended road trips in the trusty Mahindra XUV700.

item.title: No one safe as Craig Bellamy unleashes fierce spray on Melbourne Storm as Warriors snap 12-year losing streak
item.description: The Storm coach has flagged some big changes after their fourth-straight loss, and ‘that’s with staff as well’.

item.title: World No.1 Scottie Scheffler shuts down golf report’s ‘awful’ question at US Masters
item.description: ‘Just a terrible question. Next question.’

item.title: Aussie veteran Jason Day rockets into contention for fairytale US Masters bid
item.description: Jason Day remained cool in crisis as chaos unfolded around him and now has a shot at the green jacket.

item.title: Investigations underway after Western Sydney homes targeted in twin drive-by attacks
item.description: The homes were shot at 15 minutes apart.

item.title: Brisbane Broncos giant Ben Te Kura granted leave to chase NFL dream at six-week training camp
item.description: Ben Te Kura has been given permission by Brisbane to depart the club with immediate effect.

item.title: Three men charged after police chase uncovers alleged ‘kill car’ linked to Sydney shootings
item.description: During the chase, police allege the men threw jerry cans from the vehicle on a motorway.

item.title: Australia’s own Billy Elliot: Devoted mum works through chemo to help support son's ballet dream
item.description: ‘It would also be my dream knowing that Henry’s big goals don’t have to be impacted by my poor health.’

item.title: Gout Gout passes Usain Bolt in ‘historic’ 200m victory at Australian Athletics Championships
item.description: The 18-year-old Aussie has beaten Bolt’s mark ‘by a big, big stretch’ in a feat that ‘transcends athletics’.

item.title: Five fighting for life after multi-vehicle crash on Tamborine Mountain Road in Queensland’s Scenic Rim
item.description: Three people have been airlifted to hospital in critical conditions.

item.title: NRL not budging on disruptor rule despite conceding multiple calls were wrong
item.description: ‘The rules are very clear. They have been that for 118 years.’

item.title: Unheralded Cats Tanner Bruhn and James Worpel win praise for stepping up in big win over West Coast
item.description: The two players benefited from increased midfield time as Chris Scott swung the magnets around.

item.title: Manhunt ends as detainee Michael Angok arrested five days after escape from Bankstown Hospital
item.description: He escaped from a hospital while awaiting deportation.

item.title: Luckless Giant Stephen Coniglio shattered after suffering a ‘brutal’ concussion during clash against Richmond
item.description: The veteran looked ‘a bit depleted’ as he sat on the bench with his head in his hands.

item.title: Queen Mary of Denmark’s father, John Dalgleish Donaldson, dies aged 84 in Tasmania
item.description: The Queen paid tribute to her father in an emotional statement.

item.title: Eels coach Jason Ryles says fans had every right to boo his side after big loss to Gold Coast
item.description: ‘It’s disappointing that we perform like that in front of them.’

item.title: Kiss and Kill: Victorian Attorney‑General Sonya Kilkenny warns Office of Public Prosecutions over plea deals
item.description: The debate comes as a report found that most criminal cases end in guilty pleas, not trials, helping with heavy caseloads.

item.title: Jessica Hull admits to being left in ‘shock’ after dramatic fall ruined chances of history-making treble
item.description: ‘I honestly don’t care about the national title.’

item.title: Middle East war: Western Australia weighs building its own fuel reserve for 'tough' times
item.description: It wouldn’t be shared with other jurisdictions, and the state government would still expect its cut of the national stockpile.

item.title: Much-loved presenter Mel McLaughlin returns to 7NEWS after revealing cancer diagnosis
item.description: The sports broadcaster went public with her cancer battle just last month.

item.title: Home And Away: Wentworth and Rush actress Nicole da Silva set to join the cast as Summer Bay’s new doctor
item.description: ‘I look forward to audiences meeting Amelia in the coming months.’

item.title: West Coast coach Andrew McQualter gives Harley Reid a clip for undisciplined acts against Geelong
item.description: The young gun ‘let himself down’ after giving away five free kicks and a 50m penalty.

item.description: A hidden danger could be lurking inside every glass of water.

item.description: Umpire audio picked up the moment the player was told he was on report.

item.description: ‘This starts to build additional capacity, really, for the global demand.’

item.description: The announcement came after US-Iran peace talks collapsed without a deal.

item.description: ‘This is something I have been pushing for since I was elected.’

item.description: Stiffening competition and a tall asking price dampen the appeal of Mazda's plug-in hybrid seven-seater.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: US President Donald Trump threatens blockade of Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news of the tenuous ceasefire holding back conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel.

item.title: Danish Queen Mary in mourning after her father's death in Hobart
item.description: John Donaldson famously ‘walked his daughter up the aisle and gave Denmark its Crown Princess’.

item.title: Man and woman dead after high-powered Lamborghini crashes on Queensland highway
item.description: The luxury sports car was left a mangled wreck after the driver lost control of the vehicle.

item.title: Hungary Prime Minister Viktor Orbán concedes defeat in ‘painful’ election result
item.description: The ousted leader was a close ally of both US President Donald Trump and Russian President Vladimir Putin.

item.title: Hyundai’s ute may be late, but it will be ‘highly competitive’
item.description: Australia’s ute segment is bursting at the seams, and Hyundai wants in – but the company will take a more cautious approach to ensure it gets it right.

item.title: Tata may be eyeing a return to Australia… again
item.description: Could the third time be a charm for Tata in Australia? Curious trademark applications suggest the time may be ripe for the Indian automaker's return.

item.title: Woman suffers life-threatening injuries in collision between car and truck in Surfers Paradise, Gold Coast
item.description: There are major traffic delays surrounding the Surfers Paradise intersection.
